title: athyrium chingianum
intro: Athyrium chingianum, also known as the Chinese Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to China, belonging to the Athyrium genus. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Athyrium chingianum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Athyrium chingianum is often dried or made into tea to harness its medicinal properties, and it can also be used as a dietary supplement in the form of capsules or tablets.
